content: Phase 1: Mobile-Responsive Design Improvements - Make all pages work perfectly on tablets and phones
Phase 2: Detailed Analytics - Add advanced skill breakdown, student comparison, trend analysis
Phase 3: Email Notifications - Add notifications for parents (exam results, progress reports)
Phase 4: Advanced Reporting Features - Add Excel export, PDF reports, custom date ranges
Phase 5: Branding/Design Customization - Add school logo support, color themes, custom branding
Phase 6: Testing - End-to-end testing of all new features
Phase 7: Push to GitHub - Save all improvements to repository
